ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_attributes" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness score of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track attributes were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track attributes were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, administrator, music producer) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "followed_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_library" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the user's library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has played the track */,
  "last_played_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the track was played */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Preferred genre */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Preferred artist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "genre", "artist_id")
)
